title: Descriptive Statistics
description: Learn how to summarize and describe the features of a dataset using measures of central tendency and dispersion.

contentBlocks.text: Measures of central tendency help us find the 'middle' or 'typical' value of a dataset. The most common measures are the **Mean**, **Median**, and **Mode**.
Dispersion describes how spread out the data is. Key measures include the **Range**, **Variance**, and **Standard Deviation**.
